pages.text:
1. Apply the definition in order to find Maclaurin/Taylor series of each of the following functions: 
 
a.   𝑓(𝑥) = cosh 𝑥  
c.   𝑓(𝑥) = 1
𝑥2 ,            𝑎= 1 
e.   𝑓(𝑥) = 5 cos 𝜋𝑥  
b.   𝑓(𝑥) =
𝑥
𝑥+ 1  
d.   𝑓(𝑥) = ln 𝑥,        𝑎= 2 
f.   𝑓(𝑥) = ln √𝑥+ 1 
 
2. Find a power series representation for each of the following functions: 
 
a.    𝑓(𝑥) =
5
1 -4𝑥2 
c.   𝑓(𝑥) =
𝑥2
8 -𝑥3 
b.    𝑓(𝑥) = 1 + 𝑥
1 -𝑥 
d.   𝑓(𝑥) =
1
(1 + 𝑥)2 
 
3. Find Maclaurin series of each of the following functions: 
 
a.   𝑓(𝑥) = 𝑒sin 𝑥 
d.   𝑓(𝑥) =
𝑥
(1 + 4𝑥2)2 
b.   𝑓(𝑥) = 𝑒-𝑥2 + cos 𝑥 
e.   𝑓(𝑥) = 𝑥2 tan-1(𝑥3) 
c.   𝑓(𝑥) = 𝑥2 + sinh(𝑥4) 
 
 
4. Evaluate each of the indefinite integrals as an infinite series: 
 
a.  ∫𝑥 cos(𝑥3) 𝑑𝑥 
c.  ∫cos 𝑥-1
𝑥
𝑑𝑥 
b.  ∫𝑒𝑥-1
𝑥
𝑑𝑥 
d.  ∫tan-1(𝑥2) 𝑑𝑥 
 
 
Mathematics Department 
Assoc. Prof. Mustafa El-Agamy 
Worksheet (1) 
Maclaurin and Taylor Series

5. Find the second order Taylor series of each of the following functions: 
 
a.   𝑓(𝑥) = √1 + 𝑥,            𝑎= 2 
b.   𝑓(𝑥) = 𝑥cos 𝑥,            𝑎= 𝜋 
c.   𝑓(𝑥) = tan-1 𝑥,            𝑎= 1 
 
 
6. Given that 𝑓(𝑥) is differentiable function at 𝒙= 𝟏 such that 𝑓(1) = 3 and 𝑓′(1) = -2. 
Find an estimated value of 𝑓(1.2).

5. Find the second order Taylor series of each of the following functions:
